headline: BUILT TO PASS INSPECTION
subheading: Design, segregate and qualify your MIA premises so the MHRA confirms rather than confronts.
flux_prompt: An elegant editorial composition of a pristine pharmaceutical cleanroom corridor rendered as abstract clinical-luxury architecture, gleaming stainless-steel airlock doors and a seamless pressure-cascade of layered glass partitions receding into soft focus, faint directional arrows of light suggesting one-directional material and personnel flow, a single wall-mounted differential-pressure gauge glowing with a fresh-green indicator, fine HEPA-filtered air currents and delicate vapour catching cool light, deep navy shadows wrapping the scene while teal and cyan ambient illumination pools across epoxy flooring, a subtle translucent layered helix motif woven faintly into the airflow as a brand signature, shallow depth of field with crisp foreground geometry melting into premium bokeh, calm sterile atmosphere of precision, control and qualified design, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
